strengths: Interlink symmetry is excellent — both pairs cross-reference each other bidirectionally and EN/ES link counts match exactly (11/6 and 12/8).
Practical structure is strong: curl verification, runtime tabs, and composable helper chain patterns give readers actionable, copy-paste guidance.
gaps: EN explanation doc links to ../reference/function-spec.md but ES counterpart links to ../referencia/especificacion-funciones.md — parity exists, but the ES version also adds ../tutorial/auth-y-secretos.md with no EN equivalent, creating asymmetric discovery paths.
Heading 'Troubleshooting' is left untranslated in the ES files, breaking the Spanish-only reading experience and signaling incomplete localization.
fixes: Add a ../tutorial/secrets-and-auth.md (or equivalent EN page) link in the EN explanation doc to mirror the ES tutorial link, or remove auth-y-secretos.md from the ES link set to restore symmetric navigation.
Translate the 'Troubleshooting' heading to 'Resolución de problemas' in all ES files to complete localization parity.
